The health benefits of Selaginella obovalis include its potential to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Selaginella obovalis are tea infusions and extracts, which are used to treat conditions such as respiratory infections and skin disorders.
